calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-13-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Rudolph Vasquez for and with Frank Gonzalez.

The Court stated that the extraordinary fees for the Executor are appropriate but not at the rate requested, and that it is willing to approve the time requested at a rate of $30.00 an hour which comes to $5,092.50. With regard to the Attorney's extraordinary fees, the Court stated that some of those hours seem to be ordinary with the exception of 3.5 hours which appear to be extraordinary. The Court granted the petition (subject to review and modification of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION

Off Calendar Feb-22-2011 Continued To Mar-08-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

Mr. Vasquez filed a status of administration stating that he would file the petition for final distribution during this week. The matter was continued to March 8, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Brown.
